full_text:
Song Dian
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Song Dian. Jian Shou consulted with him about He Jin. Favourite of Emperor Ling. Song Dian was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Song Dian lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
